global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with a clear focus on a flash sale promotion.
global.main_message: Promoting a flash sale with a call to action to shop bestsellers.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and engaging backdrop.

elements.label: ThreadMark logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring two overlapping rectangles, representing a modern and minimalist design.

elements.label: Icon representation
elements.description: An icon of two stylized windows or panels, suggesting a digital or app interface.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A small circular element that adds visual interest, positioned near the logo.

elements.label: 30% discount badge
elements.description: A small badge displaying '30%' in a bold font, indicating a discount offer.

elements.label: Flash sale announcement
elements.description: A prominent headline in bold text stating 'Flash sale live', designed to grab attention.
elements.text_content: Flash sale live Shop bestsellers now

elements.label: Shop bestsellers now
elements.description: A supportive body text below the headline, encouraging users to shop bestsellers.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button with the text 'Try for free', inviting users to take action.

elements.label: Discount percentage
elements.description: A small text element displaying '30%', indicating a promotional discount.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, modern minimalist with bold text, flash sale announcement, discount offer
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is positioned at the top, followed by the headline and body text in the center, with the CTA button at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: ThreadMark, Flash sale live, Shop bestsellers now, Try for free, 30%
